Einar!: Magda, something's wrong, right? The air feels heavy.
I mean we're pretty far down. It's probably the mold...
(You look down at the dust left in the shape of a body.)
(You crouch down to card a hand through the remains when you notice a marble glimmering in the dirt.)
(He's left no other remains. You pocket the glass bauble and continue.)
Ray!
Your grace, are you alright?
I've been better. Please help me up.
Of course, your grace.
That armor...are you from House Ronan?
You may address me as Duchess Josephine.
(Her eyes grow as wide as saucer dishes.)
My apologies, your grace. I didn't, um, well... Erm...
Um, your grace, why did you follow us down a well? Who was that guy? Is he dead??
That was a knight in service to House Ronan.
He matters not now. Where are we?
This is just a well nearby. We didn't have a plan, your grace. The explosion was too fast.
Then I suppose all we can do is move forward. This is Dame Rachelle, knight commander
of House Ronan. Follow her orders and you'll live to see the surface world again.
Greetings.
I'm Magda.
You're a sister of the cloth?
Yes, your grace.
Are your healing prayers particularly strong?
They should be adequate for our circumstances, your grace.
Um... your grace, I'm Lachlan.
(Her eyes shine with interest.)
You're a mage of the Academy? I don't recognize you, but your uniform is quite... large for your frame.
What do you specialize in?
I'm really only good at fire spells.
He's very adept with fire. Without a sniper, he'll be good at range.
Perfect. Ray will take the vanguard, we'll support her from the back.
If you would, Ray.
Of course, your grace.
